titleStmt.title: SII 25.62: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 62. (A.R. No. 62 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.

p.hi: Bhūpati-uḍaiyar, son of Bokkaṇa-uḍaiyar Śaka 1332: 1410 A.D.

summary.p: This record belongs to the reign period of Bhūpati-uḍaiyar who is in all probability be identical with Vijaya Bhūpatirāyar of another record from this place (A.R. No. 63 of 1908) or Vīra-Bhūpati-uḍaiyar of Veḍāl record (A.R. No. 75 of 1908) The details of date given viz., Śaka 1332, Vikṛiti, Kanni ba 8, Monday may correspond to 1410 A.D, September 22, but the tithi was Navami.

It registers the kāṇivilai-pramāṇam issued in the name of Ādichaṇḍēśvara by two persons Ēṉādaṉ Virayaṉ Sembiyadaraiyaṉ and Maṇḍalapurushaṉ (Tāya)dēvaṉ, for the lands excluding the dēvadāṉa portion in the area called Kaḻudaimēṭṭuk-kollai at the kāṇi-āṭchi village Puravarai-nallūr to the tānattār and kaikkōḷar of the village Vaḻugūr alias Kalikaḍiṉda-śōḻanallūr in Irumbēḍu-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam, for a price value of 35 vāśipaḍā-naṟ-paṇam deducting the value from out of kaḍamai for the cultivation made in the year Virōdhi. It also states that they have agreed to pay the taxes for these lands and the tirunāmattukkāṇi lands of the deity. This land transaction executed at the request of Maṉṟār Vaṇikkar of Vaḻugūr was attested by a number of signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman mahāmaṇḍaliśvaran virapokkaṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar pūpatirāya Uṭaiyaṟkkuc cellāṉiṉṟa śakābdam 10 3[3 10 2] mel cellāṉiṉṟa
vikiṟuti varuṣam kaṉniṉā(ā)yaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu Aṣṭami (soma vāsura)ttu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟa koṭṭattu Irumpeṭunāṭṭu vaḻukūrāṉa(k) kalikaṭiṉta
coḻanāllūr maṉṟār vaṇikkarmār keṭṭu kāṇivilai Āvaṇa kai Eḻuttu . Ivvūr Eṉāttaṉ virayaṉ cempiyataraiyaṉum meṟpaṭi maṇṭala puruṣaṉ tāyatevaṉum Ivviruvarom Eṅkaḷūr kāṇiāṭci Āṉa
puravarainallūril kaḻutai meṭṭuk kollaiyil nālu taricukku naṭu muṉ tiruccūlatāpanattukkuṭpaṭṭa nilattil tevatāṉam pāti nikki Eṅkaḷ tiṟampil pāti koḷvāruḷaro Eṉṟu moḻi Itaṟku Etir moḻi kuṭuttor Ivūr Āḷ Uṭaiyār tiruvayaṉicuramuṭai
yār koyil caṇṭe curaṉ Aruḷic ceyaṟpaṭikku Ivvūrt tānattārum kaikoḷarum vilaikuṟitta nilavilai tantu koṭuppa Eṉṟu piṟkūṟap piṟ kūṟiyārum Irukka kaḻutai meṭṭuk kollaiyil nālutakucukku naṭumunpu tiruccūla nilam Uḷḷatu nāyaṉār tevatāṉam pāti
ṉīkki Eṅkaḷ pātikku Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭa taṉ naṭakkum vāci paṭā naṟ ø3 10 5 Ippaṇa muppattañcukkum Ātiśaṇḍeśvara vilaiyāka viṟṟu Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṭci cāttaṉūrp paṭṭikaikku
viroti varuṣattukku nāṅkaḷ Uḻata kaṭamaikku pūṇṭa paṇam nikkin nilaikku Ivar kaiyil vāṅki celutti viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Inta nilamum nāyiṉār tirunāmattukāṇi Uṭan cettukkoṇṭu muṉpilāṇṭu cammatittu Uṭaṉe Inta nilamumuṭpaṭa Iṟuttuk
koḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟuti poruṭ celavu varappeṟṟom Eṉṟu collappeṟā tākavum Ik kāṇi Āṭcikki Eppeṟpaṭṭakalaṉu millaik kalaṉuḷavāy paṭilyāṅkaḷe kalaṉ tirttu kuṭukka kaṭavomākavum
tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kalluveṭṭik kuṭuttom Iviruvarom Ippaṭikku Eṉārttaṉ virayaṉ cempiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku maṇṭala puruṣaṉ tāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ kāṇivilai piṟamāṇam paṇṇiṉamaikku Ivaicaḷukkip paṟṟu nāṭṭu
veṇ peruntaravāṇātarāyaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vitiṉūr mukkuṭaic cel
Aṟiveṉ caḷukkinampiyāṉa paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ku kku piḷḷaiyāṉārāyiṉa Aruḷāḷap perumāḷ toṇṭaimaṇṭalap piramarāya

Aṟiveṉ Ivvūr cempiyaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ / Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉcāvaka yaṉ / Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vituṟūr Aḻakapperumāḷ /
ṟiveṉ caḷukki vaṇṇakkaṉ Aruḷāḷaṉātaṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ caḷukki nallū vittaṉ^1^ /
Digital edition of SII 25.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
